description: CRITICAL: ALWAYS call this tool - NEVER make up, guess, or fabricate data. Remove one or more contacts from a tag. IMPORTANT: When removing multiple contacts from the same tag, ALWAYS include ALL phone numbers in a SINGLE call using the phoneNumbers array - DO NOT make separate calls for each contact.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to call APIs on behalf of a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.

tagName.description: Name of the tag to remove contacts from

phoneNumbers.description: Array of phone numbers to remove from the tag. Include ALL phone numbers in this single array - do not make multiple API calls.
